results.text: Ethan MacKenzie - Stats, Contract, Salary & More - Elite Prospects. MacKenzie never stops working and battling. He plays an ultra-aggressive defensive game, closing on opponents as they receive the puck, throwing crushing hits, beating down net-front attackers, and constantly scanning and moving. Ethan MacKenzie Hockey Stats and Profile at hockeydb.com. Statistics of Ethan MacKenzie, a hockey player from Peachland, BC born Sep 2 2006 who was active from 2022 to 2026.
